headline: Is Cactus (WHD) One of the Best American Oil Stocks to Buy Now?
summary: Cactus, Inc. (NYSE:WHD) is included among the 12 Best American Oil Stocks to Buy Now. Cactus, Inc. (NYSE:WHD) designs, manufactures, sells, and rents engineered pressure control and spoolable pipe technologies in the United States, Australia, Canada, the Middle East, and internationally. On June 6, Stifel upped its price target on Cactus, Inc. (NYSE:WHD) from $66 […]
